text.tspan: SOURCES SAY
@unhappychoice pushes 12 dependency PRs in one week, trimming 1266 lines of bloat
UNPRECEDENTED
@unhappychoice releases Splashboard v2.9.0 with VPN and listening‑port support
EXPERTS BAFFLED
@unhappychoice bumps @typescript-eslint to 8.61.0, leaving stale linting in the dust
KEYBOARD ON FIRE
@unhappychoice logs 76 commits on Friday, proving bandwidth can be a feature
JUST IN
@unhappychoice finishes 35 reviews before lunch, keeping the merge queue humming
DEVELOPING
@unhappychoice keeps 195 commits rolling while the repo count stays clean
TREMENDOUS MERGES
@unhappychoice merges 6 PRs into Splashboard, adding 2 new network features
